prompt: Create a cinematic vertical full-body photorealistic shot of exactly one young man, slim young adult man with messy dark hair and an intentionally blurred, unidentifiable face, standing on top of a rough urban stone wall while looking down and typing on exactly one black smartphone held in both hands. He wears exactly 6 visible outfit/accessory elements: a black hoodie, a white undershirt peeking below the hem, loose black cargo pants, black-and-white high-top sneakers, one pair of black over-ear headphones, and no other visible accessories. Pose him in side profile, head bowed, shoulders relaxed, calm and absorbed in the phone. Set the scene on an elevated overlook above a river and city skyline at sunset blue hour, with warm orange light near the horizon fading into cool gray-blue clouds. Include distant high-rise buildings with a few lit windows, a river or waterfront, tree silhouettes, streetlights, and a long stone parapet receding into perspective with subtle graffiti on the lower wall. Use soft natural ambient light, realistic shadows, shallow cinematic depth, muted urban colors, 35mm documentary street-photography feel, high detail stone texture, atmospheric skyline haze, vertical framing, and a calm focused mood. Keep the man full-body and centered slightly left, with negative sky space above and the skyline across the lower background. No readable text, no logos, no extra people.
